title: KelvinOutOfRangeDetection
content:
# KelvinOutOfRangeDetection


## Properties

- **enabled** (`boolean`): Define if the out of range detection algorithm is enabled.
- **configuration** (`object`): The configuration for the out of range detection algorithm.

enabled.description: Define if the out of range detection algorithm is enabled.

configuration.description: The configuration for the out of range detection algorithm.

min_threshold.description: The minimum threshold for the out of range detection.

max_threshold.description: The maximum threshold for the out of range detection.
